title: Meslek Yüksekokulu

Meslek Yüksekokulları

Meslek Yüksekokulu

Programlar

Mimari Restorasyon

MENU

An education model focused on practice (learning by doing) that develops the leadership and entrepreneurship skills of professional candidates is adopted. In education where theoretical courses are integrated with practical studies; The basic principles of the field of architecture are covered, and it is aimed for students to specialize with elective courses in a wide range of disciplines. With the active participation of practicing architects in the education process, it is aimed to compare students with the real world in education and to get to know their professional environment early.

Our students, who receive the title of "Restoration Technician" upon graduation, receive training for both project and implementation processes for two years.

While the first year of our program includes courses aimed at creating a technical and theoretical infrastructure, in the second year our students take courses within a program aimed at project preparation and construction site applications. Lesson plans are created to develop students' individual professional qualifications as well as their collective working skills and responsibilities. Our teaching staff is improving every year, with our permanent instructors who are experienced in their fields, as well as our expert instructors who are actively involved in business life.

We also have technical and theoretical elective courses that support this general program. Our program is also supported by extracurricular activities such as technical trips, seminars or conference participation.

Our students, who wish, can be placed in certain undergraduate programs related to the field, such as architecture or interior architecture, with the central vertical transfer exam.

Our vision is to raise individuals who are qualified in their field, aware of ethical and principled values, and open to learning and self-improvement.
